div1.entryFree: Metre, verse, numbers: stretched m. of an antique song, Sonn. 17, 12. thou never wast where grace was said. No? a dozen times at least. What, in m.? Meas. I, 2, 22 (which perhaps means: in a play, on the stage). lascivious --s, R2 II, 1, 19. these same m. balladmongers, H4A III, 1, 130.
